tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Fortress Around Your Heart – STING 

[tab][ch]Gm9[/ch] (xxxx10-10 xxxx8-8 xxxx6-5 xxxx8-8) 
 Under the ruins of a walled city[/tab]
 Crumbling towers in beams of yellow light
 No flags of truce, no cries of pity
 The siege guns have been pounding all through the night

[tab][ch]Eb[/ch] (xxxx9-9 xxxx8-8 xxxx6-6 xxxx8-8)            
 It took a day to build the city[/tab]
 We walked through the streets in the afternoon

[tab][ch]F#m9[/ch] (xxxx9-9 xxxx7-7 xxxx5-4 xxxx7-7)          
 As I returned across the fields I'd known[/tab]
 I recognized the walls that I once made
 I had to stop in my tracks for fear 

[tab][ch]B7[/ch]/4 (xxxx7-7 xxxx5-5 xxxx4-4  SI7/4)           
 Of walking on the mines I'd laid[/tab]

 Chorus:
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
 And if I built this fortress around your heart[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
 Encircled you in trenches and barbed wire[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
 Then let me build a bridge, for I cannot fill the chasm [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Eb7[/ch]+  [ch]F[/ch]  
 And let me set the battlements on fire [/tab]

[tab][ch]Gm9[/ch]
 Then I went off to fight some battle[/tab]
 That I'd invented inside my head
 
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch] 
 Away so long for years and years[/tab]
 You probably thought or even wished that I was dead
 
[tab][ch]F#m9[/ch]
 While the armies all are sleeping[/tab]
 Beneath the tattered flag we made
 I had to stop in my tracks for fear

[tab][ch]B7[/ch]/4
 Of walking on the mines I'd laid[/tab]

 Repeat Chorus

[tab][ch]Gm9[/ch]
 This prison has now become your home[/tab]
 A sentence you seem prepared to pay
 
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]
 It took a day to build the city[/tab]
 We walked through it's streets this afternoon

[tab][ch]F#m9[/ch]
 As I returned across the lands I'd known[/tab]
 I recognized the fields where I'd once played
 I had to stop in my tracks fear

[tab][ch]B7[/ch]/4
 Of walking on the mines I'd laid[/tab]

 Repeat Chorus

CIAO
CLAUDIO
